section.heading: Rule of construction

content.p: Nothing in this subchapter shall be construed to authorize the Secretary to mandate, direct, or control an institution of higher education’s specific instructional content, curriculum, or program of instruction.

section.sourceCredit: (Pub. L. 89–329, title VI, § 633, as added Pub. L. 110–315, title VI, § 622, Aug. 14, 2008, 122 Stat. 3343.)
